description: Redundant double-setTimeout pattern in blur handler creates fragile timing. mountCodeMirrorForNote wraps the blur callback in setTimeout(0) (feedRowEditMode.ts:142-152), and handleEditorBlur adds another setTimeout(0) wrapping exitInlineEdit/onEditorExit (FeedRow.svelte:191-196). This double-deferral means the blur→exit path runs 2 macrotasks after the actual blur event, creating a race window between the $effect cleanup (which fires synchronously on state change) and the delayed exit calls. When combined with FIND-201, this contributes to the unmount bypass and EditorView leak.
